Concrete Jungle

Riverside · Jacksonville · 2024

Bold City Saint

Downtown · Bay St · 2023

Coin Riot

Five Points · 2024

Player One

One artist. One city. Zero filters.

DUVAL SAINT has been bombing legal walls, curating block parties, and building a streetwear label out of the Bold City since day one. Every piece here is drawn, sprayed, and printed in Duval County.

Read the Story
  • 50+Murals painted
  • 904Reppin' the code
  • 100%Made in Jax
  • ∞Cans emptied

Got a wall that needs a legend?

Murals, live painting, brand collabs and custom pieces — let's build.
